aeo_readiness.summary: The website has a good foundation for AEO with clear service offerings and location targeting, but lacks comprehensive content depth and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and provide fresh content.
Create location-specific service pages for each city listed to improve local SEO.
Implement a blog to regularly publish content related to HVAC services, maintenance tips, and industry trends.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes basic business information but lacks detailed service descriptions and unique selling propositions.
gbp_analysis.summary: The website has a good structure for Google Business Profile (GBP) but needs more detailed content to fully leverage GBP features.
critical_issues: No customer reviews or ratings on the website to support GBP credibility.
Missing detailed service descriptions that can be used for GBP posts and updates.
No clear call-to-action for users to engage with the business beyond requesting service.

nap_citations.summary: The business has a consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) on the website but lacks citations on external platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile to ensure NAP consistency across Google services.
List the business on local directories and citation sites such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.
Monitor and manage online citations to correct any inconsistencies or errors.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of comprehensive content and user engagement features.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for detailed HVAC services, maintenance tips, and customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement a blog and publish regular content related to HVAC services and maintenance.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establish the business as a local authority by creating detailed, informative content and engaging with the community through reviews and social media.
